__doc: Snapshot of REAL production order order_01KVHNQ2MNQ1P50DVB62D7F3CC (display_id 135), 9 catch-weight line items, UPS Overnight to MA. Captured 2026-06-19 to reproduce the order.placed subscriber failures (key real-data traits the hand-built mocks missed: order.metadata is NULL; shipping_methods[0].data={externalId:123} & .metadata=null so the UPS service code is only derivable from .name; bundle line metadata; variant.metadata only carries qbd_list_id).
